fields.description:
## Why
Fail-open is the IRONCLAD invariant of this epic — a false "absent"/false finding is the cardinal sin, and a
non-adopting client must pay nothing. That guarantee has to be verified uniformly across every backend on a
real polyglot corpus, not assumed per-component.

## What
- A **fail-open conformance suite**: for every backend (universal-ctags, deps/registries, OpenGrep/ast-grep,
  scc/lizard) assert that unsupported-lang / missing-tool / parse-error / crash / timeout / version-skew /
  invalid-detector each yields `abstain(reason)` + a coverage entry — never a raise, never a false `absent`/
  false finding. Includes the IN-PROCESS cases (a hung/segfaulting tree-sitter parse under the worker boundary)
  and the loader quarantining a schema-invalid project detector.
- A **refutation-yield + false-refute eval** on a real multi-language corpus (seeded by
  docs/experiments/code-grounding-spike/): measure what fraction of real cross-file names the T1 floor resolves
  (`refuted`) and confirm ZERO false-refute — so the floor's value is MEASURED, not asserted.
- A **polyglot fixture corpus** spanning several languages + ecosystems (incl. an unsupported-language case, a
  project-supplied-language-extension case, a monorepo/workspace package, an import-vs-distribution-name case)
  exercising all three jobs.
- A **non-adoption test**: with the optional extra absent, core imports cleanly and any oracle query fails open
  to abstain/no-op with zero footprint.

## Scope
- `tests/grounding/`; depends on S2, S3, S4 (can develop alongside S5). Reuse the contract/harness from S1.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Conformance matrix: each backend × each failure mode (unsupported-lang / missing-tool / parse-error / crash / timeout / version-skew / invalid-detector, incl. in-process hang/segfault) → `abstain(reason)` + coverage; zero raises, zero false-refute.
- [ ] Refutation-yield + false-refute eval on a real multi-language corpus (seeded by docs/experiments/code-grounding-spike/): yield measured, false-refute = 0.
- [ ] Polyglot fixture corpus covering all three jobs incl. unsupported-lang, project-supplied-language-extension, monorepo/workspace, import-vs-dist-name.
- [ ] Non-adoption test: extra absent → core import-clean, queries fail open to abstain/no-op, zero footprint.
- [ ] Coverage reconstructable from recorded skips across a mixed-language run.
